settings.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
settings.lede: Kevin setup takes about 60 seconds: connect power, place near a window, and configure in the Kevin app. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.
settings.cta_subheading: Our team can walk you through placement and app setup.

settings.heading: Four steps to believable presence.
settings.body: Most customers complete setup in under a minute. Follow these steps for the best results.

settings.title: Unbox and place
settings.body: Set Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect the included power cable (approx. 3 m). Typical use is around 9 watts.

settings.title: Download the Kevin app
settings.body: Pair your device over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, rename it if you like, and confirm firmware is up to date.

settings.title: Choose your routine
settings.body: Activate instantly, schedule by day and hour, or enable geo-fencing so Kevin starts when you leave.

settings.title: Test from outside
settings.body: Step outside after dark and check what neighbours see—warm light, movement, and believable sound through the window.

settings.heading: Where Kevin works best.
settings.body: Kevin needs a visible window and a surface for shadows. Living rooms, ground-floor windows, and holiday-home facades are ideal.

settings.image_alt: Kevin shadow simulation visible through a window at night
settings.title: Window visibility matters
settings.body: Burglars look for dark, silent homes. Position Kevin so light and shadow are visible through curtains from the street or hallway outside.

settings.title: Try geo-fencing first
settings.body: Geo-fencing is the easiest daily routine: Kevin activates when you leave and you never have to remember to tap the app.

settings.question: Does Kevin need Wi-Fi to simulate presence?
settings.answer: Kevin stores simulations locally and plays them from the device. Wi-Fi or Bluetooth is used for app setup and updates—but core protection continues even when the network is unavailable.

settings.question: Can I upload my own sounds?
settings.answer: Yes. Record or upload familiar household sounds in the Kevin app. Kevin also uses AI-generated household audio to keep simulations believable and less repetitive.

settings.question: What if something goes wrong?
settings.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty and 30-day returns. Note the serial number on the bottom of the unit and contact hello@lurafi.com with your order details.

settings.title: Warranty & service
settings.body: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty and 30-day returns. If your device stops working, note the serial number on the bottom of the unit and contact support with your order details.
